name: community-ops-kit
description: Evidence-based community operations workflows for onboarding, activities, creators, paid members, reporting, automation, risk, and operator writing.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable workflows for evidence-based community operations
interface.longDescription: Plan and review community operations across onboarding, activities, creators, paid members, daily and weekly reporting, automation, support risk, and operator communication.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose the main friction in my community lifecycle and give me the next operating actions.
Turn these community notes into a weekly review with evidence, risks, and priorities.
Design a community activity with a clear participation loop and review metrics.
